questions.question: Which of the following is a major advantage of using PowerPoint presentations in the teaching-learning process?
options: B) Allows for easy addition of multimedia elements
questions.explanation: PowerPoint presentations allow for easy addition of multimedia elements, which can engage students and enhance the learning experience.

questions.question: The chalk and talk method primarily relies on
questions.explanation: The chalk and talk method primarily relies on lectures and discussions, where the teacher presents information to the students and engages in discussion.

questions.question: What is a common criticism of the chalk and talk method?
options: C) It does not encourage student participation
questions.explanation: A common criticism of the chalk and talk method is that it is too passive, as students are not actively engaged in the learning process.

questions.question: PowerPoint presentations can be used to supplement the chalk and talk method by
questions.explanation: PowerPoint presentations can be used to provide additional visual aids, which can enhance the learning experience and supplement the chalk and talk method.

questions.question: Which of the following is a limitation of the chalk and talk method?
options: B) It does not allow for real-time feedback
questions.explanation: A limitation of the chalk and talk method is that it does not allow for real-time feedback, as students may have questions or need clarification after the lecture.
